composition.important_crop_information: Top of cab, bottom of bumper, and both sides of cab fully within frame. Minor crop of lower bumper corners.

company_identity.position: top of cab, centered above windshield, horizontal, blue text on yellow background

owner_signatures.text_or_element: Decorative multi-color striping (red and blue) around lower grille and headlights
owner_signatures.position: across grille perimeter and bumper trim
interior of cab, above dashboard, centered in windshield

bumper_lights.position: bumper, two on each outer lower corner

main_headlights.position: left and right edge of grille, integrated into bodywork

windshield_contents: Blue LED/neon illuminated object (shaped like round-cornered rectangle), upper center
Interior curtain fringe, pale color, follows upper arc of windshield

front_geometry.grille_description: Four wide horizontal slatted bars forming primary grille; chrome finish with large Mercedes-Benz emblem centered
front_geometry.headlight_description: Two main headlight units, each with complex lens shape, integrated LED strips, outermost positions
front_geometry.bumper_description: Large yellow bumper with chrome details, built-in fog/auxiliary lights, license plate in center
